nodes.name: Daily 6:30PM IST
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 18:30. Workflow timezone is Asia/Kolkata (see Settings), so this fires at 18:30 IST.

nodes.name: Fetch Evening Summaries
nodes.notes: GET /api/production/evening-summary (internal auth). Returns { summaries: [...], meta } for tier_2+ orgs. Each summary contains: organization_id, owner_phone, language_preference, date_label, total_produced, total_rejected, yield_pct, rejection_rate_pct, high_rejection (boolean), has_data. Only orgs with production batches logged today are included.

nodes.name: Split Into Summaries
nodes.notes: Fans the summaries array to one item per org. Referenced by downstream nodes for item-stable lineage.

nodes.name: Has Data
nodes.notes: Defense-in-depth guard: has_data true, owner phone present, language set. The endpoint already enforces all three; this catches any contract drift.

nodes.name: High Rejection?
nodes.notes: Branches on high_rejection flag (rejection_rate_pct > 10%). True → alert template; False → normal template. Two separate Meta templates keep the copy clean and avoid empty variables.

nodes.name: Send Summary with Alert

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ to: $json.owner_phone, type: 'template', orgId: $json.organization_id, template: { name: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'evening_production_summary_alert_gujarati' : 'evening_production_summary_alert', language: { code: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'gu' : 'en' }, components: [{ type: 'body', parameters: [{ type: 'text', text: String($json.date_label) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.total_produced) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.total_rejected) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.yield_pct) }] }] } }) }}

nodes.notes: Sends evening_production_summary_alert template when rejection rate > 10%. Body copy includes '⚠️ High rejection rate — check quality.' baked in. Variables: {{1}}=date_label, {{2}}=total_produced, {{3}}=total_rejected, {{4}}=yield_pct.

nodes.name: Send Summary Normal

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ to: $json.owner_phone, type: 'template', orgId: $json.organization_id, template: { name: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'evening_production_summary_gujarati' : 'evening_production_summary', language: { code: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'gu' : 'en' }, components: [{ type: 'body', parameters: [{ type: 'text', text: String($json.date_label) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.total_produced) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.total_rejected) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.yield_pct) }] }] } }) }}

nodes.notes: Sends evening_production_summary template when rejection rate ≤ 10%. Variables: {{1}}=date_label, {{2}}=total_produced, {{3}}=total_rejected, {{4}}=yield_pct.

nodes.name: Merge Send Branches
nodes.notes: Reunites the alert and normal send branches before logging analytics. Both paths send one WhatsApp per org then flow here.

nodes.name: Log Summary Sent

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ orgId: $('Split Into Summaries').item.json.organization_id, chatPhone: $('Split Into Summaries').item.json.owner_phone, messageType: 'evening_production_summary_sent', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: POST /api/analytics/log-intent → PostHog. Reads org/phone from Split node (last 1:1 node before the IF branch) since Send node responses strip them. Privacy-safe: orgId + masked phone + event type only.

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Set this workflow as its own Error Workflow in Settings > Error Workflow.

nodes.name: Log Error

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'n8n_evening_production_summary', error: $json.error?.message, workflow: $json.workflow?.name, node: $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted, executionId: $json.execution?.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: Logs failures to Sentry via /api/errors/log. Never messages a customer chat.
